name_en: Large H Real Photos 🍠🍠🍠 'Iron Grey, Coffee, Cherry Blossom 🌸 Pink, Milk White, Caramel' 6⃣️ Colors Large H Real Photos 🍠🍠🍠 Exclusive Release 'Export Product' OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 25k Large Diamond Calfskin LP Box 👅👅 Black Gold! Play with the LP Box bag new large diamond pattern 🌟🌟 Version is very classic and atmospheric, the front double C is eye-catching and exquisite, calfskin material is not delicate at all!! Textured when carried by hand, and adds a casual elegance when worn on the chain. Easily adapts to different styles, can hold daily small items, turns heads when worn~ A definite fashion item ✓ Size: 17x19.5x5cm
